additionalVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the json-exporter pods

additionalVolumes.description: Additional volumes for the json-exporter pods

affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#affinity-v1-core

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Whether the container has a read-only root filesystem.

runAsNonRoot.description: Indicates that the container must run as a non-root user. If true, the Kubelet will validate the image at runtime to ensure that it does not run as UID 0 (root) and fail to start the container if it does. If unset or false, no such validation will be performed. May also be set in SecurityContext. If set in both SecurityContext and ContainerSecurityContext, the value specified in ContainerSecurityContext takes precedence.

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified.

capabilities.description: The capabilities to add/drop when running containers. Defaults to the default set of capabilities granted by the container runtime. Capabilities should be added to or removed from the default set based on the specific needs of the container. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#capabilities-v1-core

image.description:
Json exporter image to deploy.
Default: docker.io/prometheuscommunity/json-exporter:v0.7.0

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy to use for json-exporter deployment

imagePullSecrets.description: Reference to one or more secrets to be used when pulling images. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/pull-image-private-registry/

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

name.description: A name of a microservice to deploy with. This name will be used as name of the microservice deployment and in labels

nodeSelector.description: Allow defines which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the Pods to prevent them from evicting. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#podpriorityclass

resources.description: The resources describe the computed resource requests and limits for single Pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

limits.description: The maximum amount of compute resources allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#meaning-of-cpu-and-memory-resource-requests-and-limits

cpu.description: The maximum amount of CPU allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The maximum amount of memory allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

requests.description: The minimum amount of compute resources required. If Requests is omitted for a container, it defaults to Limits if that is explicitly specified, otherwise to an implementation-defined value. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#meaning-of-cpu-and-memory-resource-requests-and-limits

cpu.description: The minimum amount of CPU required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The minimum amount of memory required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

securityContext.description: SecurityContext holds pod-level security attributes. The parameters are required if a Pod Security Policy is enabled for Kubernetes cluster and required if a Security Context Constraints is enabled for Openshift cluster

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod. If unset, the Kubelet will not modify the ownership and permissions of any volume.

labels.description: Labels set which will create in service

name.description: Port name of json-exporter which use in service

port.description: Port of json-exporter which use in service

serviceAccount.description: Service account for monitoring-operator to use. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-service-account/

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

install.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created

name.description: The name of the service account to use. If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

defaults.description: Default values that will be used for all ServiceMonitors created by `targets`

additionalMetricsRelabels.description: Map of metric labels and values to add

enabled.description: If true, a ServiceMonitor CRD is created

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints
